            exact h₁₁
          exact h₁₀
        exact h₉
      have h₉ : 2 ^ w ≥ p := by
        have h₁₀ : p ≤ 2 ^ w := by
          -- Use the fact that p is a prime and 2^w grows faster than p
          have h₁₁ : p ≤ 2 ^ w := by
            by_contra h₁₂
            have h₁₃ : 2 ^ w < p := by omega
            have h₁₄ : (e.eval.val : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := h₅
            have h₁₅ : (e.eval.val : ℕ) < p := by omega
            have h₁₆ : (e.eval.val : ℕ) < p := by omega
            have h₁₇ : (e.eval : ZMod p) = e.eval := rfl
            -- Use the fact that the value of the element in ZMod p is less than p
            have h₁₈ : (e.eval.val : ℕ) < p := ZMod.val_lt (e.eval)
            omega
          exact h₁₁
        omega
      omega
    have h₄ : (e.eval.val : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := by
      norm_cast at h ⊢
      <;> simp_all [h]
    exact h₃ h₄
  exfalso
  exact h₁
